project.description: Renders HPDS configuration templates with environment-specific values and uploads to S3.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: INFRASTRUCTURE_GIT_HASH
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Git hash of the infrastructure repo to checkout

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: RENDER_AUTH_HPDS
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Render and upload the auth HPDS env file

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: RENDER_OPEN_HPDS
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Render and upload the open HPDS env file

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
# Source folder containing the scripts source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/"
# Iterate through the files in the folder and source them for script_file in "$source_scripts_folder"*.sh; do chmod +x "$script_file" if [ -f "$script_file" ] && [ -x "$script_file" ]; then echo "sourcing $script_file" source "$script_file" fi done
cd app-infrastructure/template-renderer
# Download S3-staged templates if they exist, otherwise fall back to repo versions echo "Attempting to download templates from S3..."
if [ "${RENDER_AUTH_HPDS}" = "true" ]; then aws s3 cp "s3://${stack_s3_bucket}/configs/hpds/templates/${TARGET_STACK}/hpds-auth.env.tftpl" \ templates/hpds-auth.env.tftpl \ && echo "Using stack-specific S3 template for hpds-auth.env.tftpl" \ || { aws s3 cp "s3://${stack_s3_bucket}/configs/hpds/templates/hpds-auth.env.tftpl" \ templates/hpds-auth.env.tftpl \ && echo "Using shared S3 template for hpds-auth.env.tftpl" \ || echo "No S3 template found, using repo version of hpds-auth.env.tftpl"; } fi
if [ "${RENDER_OPEN_HPDS}" = "true" ]; then aws s3 cp "s3://${stack_s3_bucket}/configs/hpds/templates/${TARGET_STACK}/hpds-open.env.tftpl" \ templates/hpds-open.env.tftpl \ && echo "Using stack-specific S3 template for hpds-open.env.tftpl" \ || { aws s3 cp "s3://${stack_s3_bucket}/configs/hpds/templates/hpds-open.env.tftpl" \ templates/hpds-open.env.tftpl \ && echo "Using shared S3 template for hpds-open.env.tftpl" \ || echo "No S3 template found, using repo version of hpds-open.env.tftpl"; } fi
terraform init -input=false
terraform apply -auto-approve -input=false \ -var="stack_s3_bucket=${stack_s3_bucket}" \ -var="environment_name=${environment_name}" \ -var="target_stack=${TARGET_STACK}" \ -var="env_private_dns_name=${env_private_dns_name}" \ -var="render_auth_hpds=${RENDER_AUTH_HPDS}" \ -var="render_open_hpds=${RENDER_OPEN_HPDS}"
